summary: Completed testing of new Instagram Story sharing feature. All tests passed: story-image endpoint returns valid 1080x1920 PNG, share button with Instagram gradient visible, download fallback works on desktop.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (login, profile, share button, download all working)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Instagram Story sharing feature fully tested. Story image endpoint at /api/certificates/{cert_id}/story-image returns 1080x1920 PNG. Share button uses Web Share API on mobile, downloads PNG on desktop. Test distributor has 1 certificate (BESLENME EĞİTİMİ). Upper Leader name (Muhammed Atak) included in story image.
verified_features: GET /api/certificates/{cert_id}/story-image - returns valid PNG (1080x1920 vertical format)
GET /api/certificates/{cert_id}/story-image - Image contains certificate content (not blank)
Profile page shows 'PAYLAŞ' button with Instagram gradient (purple→red→orange)
Share button click triggers PNG download on desktop (fallback from Web Share API)
PDF download button still present and functional
